content.full_text:
May 14, 2004

Peter A. Bagatelas  
Bagatelas Law Firm  
380 West Portal Avenue, Suite F  
San Francisco, CA 94127

Re: Your Request for Advice  
Our File No. 04-092

Dear Mr. Bagatelas:

This letter is in regard to your request for advice dated April 22, 2004, regarding the campaign provisions of the Political Reform Act (the “Act”).1

As we discussed on April 23, 2004, the Commission will decline to provide verbal advice regarding complex questions or facts. Further, the Commission does not give advice in answer to purely hypothetical questions. (Regulation 18329(b)(8)(D) and (c)(4)(D).) Consequently, in order to proceed with our response to your advice request, we would need the name of the specific person whose duties are the subject of your request. (See regulation 18329(a)(2)(A).)

Please note, if we are unable to obtain the information requested, we will withdraw your request for written advice. Please provide the information as soon as possible, but no later than May 31, 2004.

If you have any other questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca  
General Counsel

By: John W. Wallace  
Assistant General Counsel

JWW:jg  
I:\AdviceLtrs\04-092

1 Government Code sections 81000 – 91014. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections 18109-18997, of the California Code of Regulations.

June 4, 2004

Peter A. Bagatilos
Bagatilos Law Firm
380 West Portal Avenue, Suite F
San Francisco, CA 94127

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-04-092

Dear Mr. Bagatilos:

As you were advised in our telephone conversation of April 23, 2004, the Commission declines to provide advice on hypothetical inquiries. (Regulation 18329(b)(8)(D), enclosed.) My May 14, 2004, correspondence formally requested that you name the individuals who were the subject of your advice request as specified in regulation 18329(b)(2)(A). To date, you have neither provided the names of these persons nor the corporations described in your inquiry.

Your request for advice has therefore been withdrawn. Should you have any questions, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: John W. Wallace
Assistant General Counsel
